rationale: Anti-gaming lens: traced end-to-end in a /tmp archive clone @41d8e8af. No un-audited path clears/merges an unresolved RC. Leg 9.5 (gate.go:281) blocks any latest-round non-APPROVE, layered ON TOP of the leg-10 Approves>=threshold floor. Refutation clearing is single-homed in isRefuted/AppliedRefutations (tally.go:192,214): byte-exact Slot + Round==LatestRound, and rcSlots only holds VerdictRequestChanges — so it can NEVER clear a REJECT (leg 9 fires first + excluded), hard_block (leg 9), unrecognized verdict (not RC), another slot, or a newer-round re-RC. Refuted RCs are removed from the blocking set but never counted as APPROVE (Tally switch), so the sub-threshold floor holds (AC7 verified). Durable obligation is sound: applied==persisted (persistRefutationPending marker-write failure returns Block, not abort-with-applied), UNION never clobbers, and reconcilePendingRefutations runs UNCONDITIONALLY at step 3.75 BEFORE close on every path (panel-present/no-panel/hatch). Satisfy-from-marker (self-contained entry, no panel re-read) means the audit survives panel removal and the deleted re-tally discharge is unspoofable-by-construction. MergeMetadata/GetMetadata fail-closed: a read error refuses, a transient read can't erase a written panel_refuted. Only 3 audited escapes exist (panel_refuted/panel_gate_skipped/panel_abandoned). Empirical: go build clean, gofmt -l empty, go vet clean, all 5 spec-114 packages PASS with -race; every anti-gaming pin green (MarkerWriteFailure_Blocks, HatchStillReconciles, SatisfyFromMarker_PanelGone, CrossRun_UnionReconcilesAll, GetMetadataError_Refuses, AuditSurvivesLaterReadError). Shipped ADR/SKILL carry no lingering discharge claim; 9.5 block message never advertises refutation.
